completion_summary: Added ReactorResult.diagnostics with deterministic nonnegativity, material-balance residual, signed jacket/reaction/loss energy-ledger, and explicit warning statuses; serialized diagnostics for auditability and added corrupted-trajectory failure coverage. Tests: reactor, reaction-network, and batch-reaction suites 46 passed; Ruff and mypy passed; claim check passed. Reference evidence: ChemWorld reactor state/ledger contracts and existing ODE policy; no external runtime implementation copied. Known limitation: energy output is a signed ledger net, not a thermal-capacity closure; independent backend comparison remains required before maturity promotion. Final implementation commit: 09b85c4.
notes: WF-00 contracts and route audit are complete. This slice is physchem-only: no task contract, runtime service/registry, World Law v0.3, benchmark evidence, or golden trajectory changes.
scope: WF-01 add explicit reactor conservation, nonnegativity, and energy-closure diagnostics for bounded batch/semibatch/CSTR/PFR solver results without changing frozen runtime routes
